mentions.mention_text: SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated March 20, 2026
mentions.evidence_text: SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated March 20, 2026 (hereafter referred as “master circular”).
mentions.title: Master Circular for Mutual Funds

mentions.evidence_text: In clause 4 of the circular (clause 5.9.1 of the master circular), guidelines were specified for intraday borrowings by mutual funds.
In clause 4 of the circular (clause 5.9.1 of the master circular), guidelines were specified for intraday borrowings by mutual funds.
mentions.title: Master Circular for Mutual Funds

mentions.evidence_text: the applicability of guidelines related to the intraday borrowings in the circular, i.e., clause 5.9.1 of the master circular shall now come into effect from July 15, 2026.
